# aisia_admin_ai_act_model_cards (Resource)

Endpoint d'administration (Bearer requis) — entité CRUD (create/read/update/delete via API).

- **Endpoint** : `/admin/ai-act/model-cards`
- **Documentation produit** : [aisia.fr/docs](https://aisia.fr/docs)
- **Référence API OpenAPI** : [api.aisia.fr/docs](https://api.aisia.fr/docs)

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aisia_admin_ai_act_model_cards" "example" {
  body = jsonencode({
    # payload create/update — voir schéma OpenAPI : https://api.aisia.fr/docs
  })
}

output "entity_id" {
  value = aisia_admin_ai_act_model_cards.example.id
}
```

## Schema

### Optional

- `annexe_iii_category` (String) champ annexe_iii_category
- `biases_identified` (String) champ biases_identified
- `ethical_considerations` (String) champ ethical_considerations
- `evaluation_data` (String) champ evaluation_data
- `intended_use` (String) champ intended_use
- `known_limitations` (String) champ known_limitations
- `model_name` (String) champ model_name
- `org_id` (String) champ org_id
- `out_of_scope_use` (String) champ out_of_scope_use
- `provider_id` (String) champ provider_id
- `published` (Boolean) champ published
- `risk_level` (String) champ risk_level
- `training_data` (String) champ training_data

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifiant de l'entité (retourné par l'API).
- `json` (String) Dernière réponse brute de l'API (JSON).
